task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/suboff_tail_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Add a new Wing component for the tail fins
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Geometry Browser shows a new 'Wing' component added to the baseline hull model.

task_completion.description: Set the X-location of the tail fins
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP parameter window for the Wing component shows the X-Location (Origin) set to 4.0.

task_completion.description: Set the span of the tail fins
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP parameter window for the Wing component shows the Span parameter set to 1.2.

task_completion.description: Configure a 4-fin cruciform layout using Rotational symmetry
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sym' (Symmetry) tab for the Wing component shows Planar symmetry disabled, Rotational (Axial) symmetry enabled, and the number of copies set to 4. The 3D viewport should visually display 4 fins arranged in a cross shape.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog or the main window title bar shows the file being saved as 'SUBOFF_cruciform.vsp3' in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenVSP graphical interface (Geometry Browser, Parameter windows, Sym tab) rather than editing the .vsp3 file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The 3D model visually reflects the parameter changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D viewport actually shows the submarine hull with the newly added 4-fin cruciform tail, proving the parameters were applied to the geometry.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the File -> Save As menu in OpenVSP, rather than just copying or renaming the baseline file via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification document requires the tail fins to have an X-Location of 4.0 m, a Total Span of 1.2 m, and 4 Rotational Copies. The final model must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/SUBOFF_cruciform.vsp3'.
